tasks.dependencies: Fetches the list of Finance endpoints/accounts/vendors to map over

tasks.task_type: PythonOperator.expand (dynamic task mapping, exponential backoff retries)
tasks.dependencies: One mapped instance per endpoint; retry policy is error-code-aware
Aggregates success/failure/retry counts across mapped instances
Evaluates aggregate retry/error rate against a storm threshold
Branch: retry rate within normal bounds
Branch: retry storm detected, trips circuit breaker for downstream calls
Pages on-call, attaches AutoRCA retry-storm analysis
Loads Finance target with successfully retrieved records

incident.description: Retry Storm incident on the Finance pipeline (RTL_FIN_RETRY): ecommerce inventory-availability API retry storm.
incident.symptoms: The real-time inventory-availability check task (Shopify + internal WMS cross-check), mapped per product page refresh, hit 3,100 retries in an hour.
incident.root_cause: A downstream internal WMS availability microservice degraded under unrelated load, and the DAG's retry policy had no maximum concurrent in-flight retries, so retries compounded faster than the struggling service could drain its queue, a self-reinforcing storm.
incident.business_impact: Product availability badges on the ecommerce site showed stale/incorrect stock status for over an hour, contributing to both oversell risk and lost sales from false out-of-stock displays.
incident.resolution: Add exponential backoff with a hard concurrency cap on retries; add a health-check gate that pauses the whole mapped task group if the WMS microservice's error rate exceeds a threshold.

expected_rca.expected_rca_summary: AI AutoRCA should identify: A downstream internal WMS availability microservice degraded under unrelated load, and the DAG's retry policy had no maximum concurrent in-flight retries, so retries compounded faster than the struggling service could drain its queue, a self-reinforcing storm.
expected_rca.evidence_required: Airflow task logs, Datadog infrastructure/application metrics, JIRA/Confluence RAG context for known-issue matching
expected_rca.airflow_logs: Airflow shows retry rate accelerating over time (not flat), consistent with a compounding storm rather than steady transient errors
expected_rca.datadog_metrics: Datadog wms_availability_service.error_rate and airflow.retry_count show a clear feedback-loop correlation
expected_rca.resolution: Add exponential backoff with a hard concurrency cap on retries; add a health-check gate that pauses the whole mapped task group if the WMS microservice's error rate exceeds a threshold.
expected_rca.preventive_action: Standardize a 'retry concurrency ceiling' parameter in the metadata model, defaulted conservatively and tunable per downstream service's known capacity.
